nodes.label: Ky Dickens

sources.quote: Harvard-trained neuroscientist studying autistic savant telepathy

nodes.label: The Telepathy Tapes
nodes.summary: Ky Dickens' podcast/documentary series documenting controlled tests of telepathic communication in autistic non-speaking children.

nodes.label: Awakenings

nodes.label: Autistic Savant Telepathy
nodes.summary: Phenomenon documented across many independent families: non-speaking autistic children demonstrating statistically significant telepathic reception of numbers, words, images — validated in controlled tests.

sources.timestamp_end: Non-speaking autistic children demonstrating telepathic ability

nodes.label: Ky Dickens asserts that non-speaking autistic children demonstrate statistically significant telepat
nodes.summary: Ky Dickens asserts that non-speaking autistic children demonstrate statistically significant telepathic abilities under controlled conditions, documented across many independent families.

sources.quote: Autistic individuals have these incredible abilities. The science behind this is so much bigger than our knee-jerk reactions of truth.

type_specific.statement_text: Ky Dickens asserts that non-speaking autistic children demonstrate statistically significant telepathic abilities under controlled conditions, documented across many independent families.

nodes.label: Dickens rented a Glendale CA house; removed mirrors and TVs; blindfolded Mia; partitioned her from h
nodes.summary: Dickens rented a Glendale CA house; removed mirrors and TVs; blindfolded Mia; partitioned her from her mother; tested with random number/picture generators — Mia was accurate every time.

sources.quote: We rented a house in Glendale California and we took all the mirrors down and all the TVs down. We'd blindfold Mia. She was right every time.

type_specific.statement_text: Dickens rented a Glendale CA house; removed mirrors and TVs; blindfolded Mia; partitioned her from her mother; tested with random number/picture generators — Mia was accurate every time.

nodes.label: The popsicle-stick test had Mia correctly pile sticks while blindfolded — Dickens notes this goes BE
nodes.summary: The popsicle-stick test had Mia correctly pile sticks while blindfolded — Dickens notes this goes BEYOND telepathy because no one was 'sending' information; suggests clairvoyance.

sources.quote: Popsicle stick tests which was beyond telepathy because no one's sending information. She could see them blind perfect blindfold.

type_specific.statement_text: The popsicle-stick test had Mia correctly pile sticks while blindfolded — Dickens notes this goes BEYOND telepathy because no one was 'sending' information; suggests clairvoyance.

nodes.label: Diane Powell's inbox contains hundreds of emails from independent, siloed parents describing their n
nodes.summary: Diane Powell's inbox contains hundreds of emails from independent, siloed parents describing their non-speaking autistic child reading their thoughts — convincing Dickens this is widespread.

sources.quote: Her email box was filled of parents reaching out saying I'm finding that my child can read my thoughts this seems impossible.

type_specific.statement_text: Diane Powell's inbox contains hundreds of emails from independent, siloed parents describing their non-speaking autistic child reading their thoughts — convincing Dickens this is widespread.

nodes.label: Oliver Sacks documented institutionalized autistic twins exchanging six-digit prime numbers with no
nodes.summary: Oliver Sacks documented institutionalized autistic twins exchanging six-digit prime numbers with no algorithm — 'they just saw them' — foreshadowing extra-cognitive savant abilities.

sources.quote: These twins who are institutionalized who were autistic who played a game in which they would say prime numbers back and forth to one another. They just knew these prime numbers and they just saw them.

type_specific.statement_text: Oliver Sacks documented institutionalized autistic twins exchanging six-digit prime numbers with no algorithm — 'they just saw them' — foreshadowing extra-cognitive savant abilities.

nodes.label: During COVID homeschooling, two independent families (Mia's and Amelia's) discovered their child's t
nodes.summary: During COVID homeschooling, two independent families (Mia's and Amelia's) discovered their child's telepathic ability once parents spent extended one-on-one time — ability hadn't manifested in school.

sources.quote: Two families - both Mia and another girl Amelia - when the parents were homeschooling with covid and they had to spend tons of time with their child all of a sudden their child started spelling on iPads doing things they weren't ever doing in school.

type_specific.statement_text: During COVID homeschooling, two independent families (Mia's and Amelia's) discovered their child's telepathic ability once parents spent extended one-on-one time — ability hadn't manifested in school.

nodes.label: Non-speaking autistic children in The Telepathy Tapes universally describe their telepathic ability
nodes.summary: Non-speaking autistic children in The Telepathy Tapes universally describe their telepathic ability as a 'spiritual gift from God' — not pathological or demonic.

sources.quote: What the non-speakers would say is this is a spiritual gift from God that is I think what every single one would say.

type_specific.statement_text: Non-speaking autistic children in The Telepathy Tapes universally describe their telepathic ability as a 'spiritual gift from God' — not pathological or demonic.

Episode: "These Children Can Read Your Mind!” (ft. Ky Dickens | Telepathy Tapes Documentary)
Ky Dickens asserts that non-speaking autistic children demonstrate statistically significant telepathic abilities under controlled conditions, documented across many independent families.
Dickens rented a Glendale CA house; removed mirrors and TVs; blindfolded Mia; partitioned her from her mother; tested with random number/picture generators — Mia was accurate every time.
The popsicle-stick test had Mia correctly pile sticks while blindfolded — Dickens notes this goes BEYOND telepathy because no one was 'sending' information; suggests clairvoyance.
Diane Powell's inbox contains hundreds of emails from independent, siloed parents describing their non-speaking autistic child reading their thoughts — convincing Dickens this is widespread.
Oliver Sacks documented institutionalized autistic twins exchanging six-digit prime numbers with no algorithm — 'they just saw them' — foreshadowing extra-cognitive savant abilities.

During COVID homeschooling, two independent families (Mia's and Amelia's) discovered their child's telepathic ability once parents spent extended one-on-one time — ability hadn't manifested in school.
Non-speaking autistic children in The Telepathy Tapes universally describe their telepathic ability as a 'spiritual gift from God' — not pathological or demonic.
